data.title: Systematic: echo | grep -q patterns across test suite are SIGPIPE-vulnerable under pipefail
data.description: Anti-pattern scan from fix of 1620-6850 and ffa0-fefe found ~50+ echo|grep -q patterns in tests/. The shared run_test.sh was fixed but individual test files still have the pattern. Under CI load with pipefail, these can intermittently return exit 141. Replace with bash [[ =~ ]] matching or grep -c.
